```{r setup-themes, echo=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)

# color lists

list_old_sha_colors <-
  dplyr::lst(
    lightblue = "#61B5CC",
    blue = "#3866A0",
    darkblue = "#214066",
    gray = "#7B8B98",
    yellowgreen = "#B8C349",
    orange = "#E39B3B",
    purple = "#47205B"
  )

list_ct_primary_colors <-
  dplyr::lst(
    primary = "#3371E7",
    primary_shade1 = "#00214D",
    primary_shade2 = "#003D9C",
    primary_shade3 = "#7094F5",
    primary_shade4 = "#C6D4FB"
  )

list_ct_secondary_colors <-
  dplyr::lst(
    secondary = "#F27124",
    secondary_shade = "#FAAA19"
  )

list_ct_tertiary_colors <-
  dplyr::lst(
    tertiary = "#D8343E",
    tertiary_shade = "#94343E"
  )

list_color_hex_codes <-
  dplyr::lst(
    list_old_sha_colors,
    list_ct_primary_colors,
    list_ct_secondary_colors,
    list_ct_tertiary_colors
  )

# custom ct themes

# for vertical plots
theme_ct_vertical <- function() {
  ggplot2::theme_classic() +
    ggplot2::theme(
      axis.line.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", family = "Poppins")
    )
}

# for sideways like horizontal plots
theme_ct_horizontal <- function() {
  ggplot2::theme_classic() +
    ggplot2::theme(
      axis.line.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", family = "Poppins")
    )
}

# text

theme_poppins_bold_all <- function() {
  ggplot2::theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Poppins", face = "bold")
  )
}
```


```{r setup-workspace, echo=FALSE}
#' Create a Modern R Project Scaffold
#'
#' Builds a standard directory structure for a data analysis project,
#' along with a starter README. Safe to re-run: existing directories/files
#' are left untouched, and only missing pieces are created.
#'
#' @param base_path The root directory where the scaffold should be built.
#'   Defaults to current working directory. Will be created if it doesn't
#'   already exist.
#' @param project_name Optional name to use in the README header. Defaults
#'   to the basename of `base_path` (or of the current working directory
#'   if `base_path = "."`).
#'
#' @return Invisibly, a named character vector of the full paths created
#'   (directories and files).
#'
#' @examples
#' \dontrun{
#' create_project_scaffold("~/projects/ct-indicator-report")
#' create_project_scaffold()  # scaffold the current working directory
#' }
#'
#' @export
create_project_scaffold <- function(base_path = ".", project_name = NULL) {

  rlang::check_installed("fs", reason = "to create the project scaffold")
  rlang::check_installed("cli", reason = "to print scaffold progress")

  # --- Argument checks ------------------------------------------------------

  if (!rlang::is_string(base_path)) {
    cli::cli_abort(c(
      "{.arg base_path} must be a single string.",
      "x" = "You supplied {.obj_type_friendly {base_path}}."
    ))
  }

  if (!is.null(project_name) && !rlang::is_string(project_name)) {
    cli::cli_abort(c(
      "{.arg project_name} must be a single string or {.code NULL}.",
      "x" = "You supplied {.obj_type_friendly {project_name}}."
    ))
  }

  # --- Resolve base_path ----------------------------------------------------

  # fs::dir_create is recursive, so base_path itself doesn't need to exist yet
  fs::dir_create(base_path)
  base_path_abs <- fs::path_abs(base_path)

  if (is.null(project_name)) {
    project_name <- fs::path_file(base_path_abs)
  }

  cli::cli_h1("Creating project scaffold")
  cli::cli_alert_info("Target directory: {.path {base_path_abs}}")

  # --- Define the directory tree --------------------------------------------

  project_dirs <- c(
    "data/raw",        # Treat raw data as read-only
    "data/processed",  # Cleaned, intermediate data ready for modeling/viz
    "R",               # Custom R functions (modular code)
    "scripts",         # Analysis scripts (e.g., 01_clean.R, 02_eda.R)
    "outputs/figures", # Generated plots
    "outputs/tables",  # Generated data summaries/CSVs
    "docs"             # Quarto/RMarkdown reports and documentation
  )

  full_dirs <- fs::path(base_path_abs, project_dirs)

  # --- Create directories idempotently ---------------------------------------
  # fs::dir_create silently no-ops on existing directories, so this is
  # already idempotent. We track which ones were newly made for reporting.

  existed_before <- fs::dir_exists(full_dirs)
  fs::dir_create(full_dirs)
  newly_created_dirs <- full_dirs[!existed_before]

  cli::cli_h2("Directories")
  if (length(newly_created_dirs) > 0) {
    cli::cli_bullets(c(
      "v" = "Created {length(newly_created_dirs)} new director{?y/ies}:"
    ))
    cli::cli_ul(fs::path_rel(newly_created_dirs, start = base_path_abs))
  }
  if (any(existed_before)) {
    cli::cli_alert_info(
      "{sum(existed_before)} director{?y/ies} already existed and {?was/were} left as-is."
    )
  }

  # --- Create starter README, but never overwrite an existing one -----------

  readme_path <- fs::path(base_path_abs, "README.md")
  created_files <- c()

  cli::cli_h2("Files")

  if (!fs::file_exists(readme_path)) {
    readme_content <- c(
      paste0("# ", project_name),
      "",
      "## Overview",
      "",
      "_Describe the purpose of this analysis project here._",
      "",
      "## Project structure",
      "",
      "```",
      "data/raw/        # Original, untouched source data (read-only)",
      "data/processed/  # Cleaned, analysis-ready data",
      "R/                # Reusable functions, sourced by scripts",
      "scripts/          # Numbered analysis scripts (01_clean.R, 02_eda.R, ...)",
      "outputs/figures/  # Generated plots",
      "outputs/tables/   # Generated summary tables / CSVs",
      "docs/             # Quarto/RMarkdown reports",
      "```",
      "",
      "## Usage",
      "",
      "_Document how to reproduce the analysis here, e.g. the order in which",
      "scripts in `scripts/` should be run._",
      "",
      paste0("Scaffold generated on ", Sys.Date(), ".")
    )
    fs::file_create(readme_path)
    writeLines(readme_content, readme_path)
    created_files <- c(created_files, readme_path)
    cli::cli_alert_success("Created {.file README.md}")
  } else {
    cli::cli_alert_info("{.file README.md} already exists; left untouched")
  }

  # --- Final summary ----------------------------------------------------------

  cli::cli_rule()
  if (length(newly_created_dirs) == 0 && length(created_files) == 0) {
    cli::cli_alert_info("Nothing to do — scaffold was already complete.")
  } else {
    cli::cli_alert_success("Scaffold ready at {.path {base_path_abs}}")
  }

  invisible(c(full_dirs, readme_path))
}
```
